Video.summary: Robert shares the chain of events that inspired him to devote his life to volunteerism and how this can bring deeper meaning to your life and soul too.
Video.title: How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy

Image.alt: How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy
How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy
How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy

Video.summary: Founder, Glenn Marsden, of Imperfectly Perfect Campaign, and Jeremy Jackson, former Baywatch star share their personal journeys with body dysmorphia and how it led to a worldwide campaign. A young man faces his fears and a tale of kindness at 30,000 ft.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect
Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect
Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect

Video.summary: Laura Di Franco, CEO of Brave Healer Productions, discusses brave healing and the power of sharing our stories. And, meet Oyen the ginger cat and adorable kids from India, along with Daaji redefining meditation for a joyful heart.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Video.summary: Emptiness and Power in the Gap. The stunning Tungnath Peak at 13,000 ft, the Feminine Temple above the Masculine. Ken goes from rational doubter to having an experience beyond understanding that relates to his deceased sister. Unfortunately, the experience is tainted by ignorance and the seemingly inspiring day is further marred when Anna has an accident…
Video.title: Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath

Image.alt: Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath

Video.summary: Kevin shares how he went from a stressed executive to a spiritually-fulfilled leader, and the unique and inspiring force that led him to his there.
Video.title: How To Find Spiritual Fulfillment with Kevin Hancock

Image.alt: How To Find Spiritual Fulfillment with Kevin Hancock
How To Find Spiritual Fulfillment with Kevin Hancock
How To Find Spiritual Fulfillment with Kevin Hancock

Video.summary: The Image Therapist Liana Chaouli will make you understand your Image, and we are getting deep in conversation with Liana and talking about how you can identify your masterpiece. You matter and we talk about how she can help you better as a person with over many years of experience! Enjoy the interview!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Liana Chaouli

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Liana Chaouli
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Liana Chaouli
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Liana Chaouli

Video.summary: Bullying Prevention Expert Betty Hoeffner is who you need to know and when it comes to Bullying, Betty knows her stuff, she has been in the industry for over 20 years and the organization Hey U.G.L.Y (Unique Gifted Loveable You) is the organization you should support, because bullying within yourself or you becoming a victim is how this orgainzation can help you or a loved one.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Betty Hoeffner

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Betty Hoeffner
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Betty Hoeffner
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Betty Hoeffner

Video.summary: Sharon Lechter, with cameo appearances by John Assaraf, Lisa Nichols, Dr.Rev Michael Beckwith, Shanda Sumpter, David Meltzer and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Sharon Lechter

Image.alt: World's Greatest Motivators - Sharon Lechter
World's Greatest Motivators - Sharon Lechter
World's Greatest Motivators - Sharon Lechter

Video.summary: You can be happy for no reason at all… Happiness can be our natural state. Start day 10 with attention at the heart center and the recollection of an uplifting memory. Holding on to that feeling, move into practice with a warm up rooted in backbending and sun salutations. Next, follow Kino through through a hip opening sequence. As we approach today’s pinnacle pose, Baddha Konasana, remember that there is no need for the body to be in any particular place. Practice acceptance and happiness here and now.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 10 Happiness Baddha Konasana

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 10 Happiness Baddha Konasana
Yoga Is - Day 10 Happiness Baddha Konasana
Yoga Is - Day 10 Happiness Baddha Konasana

Video.summary: Day 11 of the challenge is centered around a quality that is perhaps the very essence of being a yogi: Compassion
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 11 Compassion Shalabhasana

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 11 Compassion Shalabhasana
Yoga Is - Day 11 Compassion Shalabhasana
Yoga Is - Day 11 Compassion Shalabhasana

Video.summary: Today is day 12 of our challenge and the lesson is built around the standing posture Parsvakonasana A.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 12 Gratitude Parsvakonasana A

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 12 Gratitude Parsvakonasana A
Yoga Is - Day 12 Gratitude Parsvakonasana A
Yoga Is - Day 12 Gratitude Parsvakonasana A

Video.summary: Do you feel both captivated and exhausted by city life? Are the conveniences worth the chaos? In this episode of the Rooted in Wellness podcast, join me, Wade Lightheart, and Matt Gallant as we explore the challenges of maintaining balance in busy urban environments and the serene contrast of ashram life.
Video.title: Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life

Image.alt: Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life
Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life
Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life

Video.summary: Have you wondered how to biohack your health as a woman? Taking control to live your best life is what we dive into in this episode with guest Aggie Lal.
Video.title: Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women

Image.alt: Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women
Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women
Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women

Video.summary: Ryan puts out prayer flags for the people who helped finance his trip, a stark contrast to the ungrateful Elle caught in blame. Warm day quickly turns cold and many are complaining about wet bedding and frigid conditions. This is Kedarnath, going beyond fickle circumstances. Ken, the newbie to spirituality isn’t so on board and his passenger Tiffany a mom with a 3 year-old, fears losing her life.
Video.title: Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen

Image.alt: Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen
Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen
Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen

Video.title: EP 1 - Location Location Location

Image.alt: EP 1 - Location Location Location
EP 1 - Location Location Location
EP 1 - Location Location Location

Video.summary: Learn why using properties you don’t own can be so lucrative.
Video.title: EP 2 - Other People's Property

EP 2 - Other People's Property
EP 2 - Other People's Property

Video.summary: The contestants prepare to make a place livable before guests arrive.
Video.title: EP 3 - We Have Company

Image.alt: EP 3 - We Have Company
EP 3 - We Have Company
EP 3 - We Have Company

Video.summary: It’s time to make the property listing live on the site and accept bookings.

EP 4 - Flip the Switch

Video.summary: Find out which contestant is named the winner and becomes Brian’s new business partner.
Video.title: EP 5 - The Finale

Image.alt: EP 5 - The Finale
EP 5 - The Finale
EP 5 - The Finale

Video.summary: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Video.summary: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Video.summary: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Video.summary: Pearl Necklace - Can a long-desired gift bring Max and Celeste closer together? While Father Cross’s guilty pleasure is exposed, leaving a young family member seeking revenge and Celeste on his trail. A Fundraiser brings Maddy back to the stage with new comic material on the stage of Denim & Diamonds fundraiser for Autism Care Today.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Video.summary: Gives viewers an inside look at the tremendous scientific effort involved in finding effective treatments for Dementia and Alzheimer's Disease.
Video.title: Research Detectives - Finding Lost Memory

Image.alt: Research Detectives - Finding Lost Memory
Research Detectives - Finding Lost Memory
Research Detectives - Finding Lost Memory

Video.summary: One of the cleverest ways cancer cells survive is by evading detection from the immune system forces that would otherwise destroy them. In this new episode of Research Detectives, we go inside the laboratory with the scientists who are working to outsmart the cancer cells and expose them. Plus, we take a look at medications and treatments that could force the cancer cells to destroy themselves.
Video.title: Research Detectives - Outsmarting Cancer

Image.alt: Research Detectives - Outsmarting Cancer
Research Detectives - Outsmarting Cancer
Research Detectives - Outsmarting Cancer

Video.summary: Join The Kitchen Psychic, Hannah McKitrick, as we talk ditching diets, embracing food freedom, and finding lightness in mind and body, alongside Susan Noles from The Golden Bachelor for some fun, and meditation leader Daaji discussing compassion.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
